lore.english:
Taimanin. Daughter of a clan exiled from their village after failing a rebellion. Her parents fled with her after their defeat, but were ultimately killed while being pursued by the Igawa Clan. She alone narrowly survived. The trauma of losing her parents triggered the awakening of her Evil Eye. She turned the tables on the pursuing Taimanins, using her powers to enchant them, faking her own death, and escaping. Since then, she has hidden her true identity and immersed herself in the underworld, earning a living through intelligence gathering and assassination.

She possesses the Evil Eye “Charm Eye", which allows her to entice anyone who makes eye contact, turning them into her puppet for several minutes. However, because the ability activates passively and beyond her control, she usually keeps her eye covered with an eye patch. In addition, she wields dual short swords in a unique Ittoryu-style that she mastered through self-training.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ACC] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ACC of All allies by 12.5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase ACC of All allies by 12.5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Snow Sting[-]
skills.description: Approaches the enemy, kicks them and finishes with a dagger to attack 2 times.
skills.description_readable: Approaches the enemy, kicks them and finishes with a dagger to attack 2 times.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Evil Eye: Charm Eye[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy with Charm Eye.
The enemy facing Charm Eye is inflicted with [&Confuse] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:80202]%[-]
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:80202] turn(s)
If the target has [&Provocation], [&Confuse] is guaranteed.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy with Charm Eye.
The enemy facing Charm Eye is inflicted with Confusion at a 35%
Duration: 1 turn(s)
If the target has Taunt, Confusion is guaranteed.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Snow Assassin[-]
skills.description: If the target has [&Confuse], inflicts 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemy with [&Confuse] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:80301]%[-] chance each attack.
skills.description_readable: If the target has Confusion, inflicts 1 Random enemy with Confusion at a 30% chance each attack.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_801]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_803]
skill_data.description:
If the enemy dies after the attack, puts 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemy into [&Confuse] mode at a [&Color_Cyan][R:81399]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:81301] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
If the enemy dies after the attack, puts 1 Random enemy into Confusion mode at a 70% chance.
Duration: 1 turn(s)
